deck.description: 6 factions x 11 ranks = 66 cards. Ranks 6-10 trigger faction powers.

setup.p0_bonus_card_description: If true, P0 is dealt 1 extra card, then discards 1 after seeing the starting pit card. Compensates for first-player information disadvantage.
setup.p0_fewer_cards_description: If > 0, P0 starts with this many fewer cards. E.g. 1 means P0 starts with (hand_size - 1). Compensates for turn-order disadvantage.
setup.description: Cards dealt to each player at game start.

play.description: Purple is wild. After 2nd reshuffle, Sugar Crash kicks in (play 2 cards per turn).

powers.description: Tunable values for faction power effects.
